phrases.intent_en: Ask about booking a spa treatment
phrases.text_local: Je souhaite réserver un soin, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh sweh-TAIT ray-zer-VAY uhn SWEHN, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Thermes Sextius is a working thermal spa built over the same hot spring the Romans discovered in 123 BC when they founded Aquae Sextiae (today's Aix). The water emerges naturally at 34°C. Bookings are recommended especially on weekends.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what temperature the thermal water is
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la température de l'eau thermale ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah tahm-pay-rah-TOOR duh loh ter-MAL
phrases.cultural_note: The thermal water at Thermes Sextius emerges naturally at 34°C from the same geothermal source used since Roman times.

The Thermes Sextius offers a full spa menu: thermal pools, hammam, massages, and beauty treatments. Some packages require a medical consultation. Day-access to the thermal pool area is available without a full treatment booking.

responses.english: Massages, hammam, thermal baths. Here's the menu.
responses.phonetic: mah-SAHZH, ah-MAM, behn ter-MOH. vwah-SEE lah KART
responses.local: Massages, hammam, bains thermaux. Voici la carte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if bathing suits and towels are provided
phrases.text_local: Les maillots de bain et les serviettes sont-ils fournis ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay mah-YOH duh BEHN ay lay ser-VYET sohn-TEEL foor-NEE
phrases.cultural_note: Bathing caps are compulsory in French thermal pools and are usually available at reception for a small fee if you do not have one. Towels are typically provided with spa packages but not always with pool-only access — check when booking.
Lockers are typically provided in the changing area. You may need a coin or token from reception.
